$AMD ARK ETFs managed by Cathy Wed have released their daily trades for Wednesday, 08.07.2026,  On the buying side, ARK made a significant purchase of 181,847 shares of Space Exploration Technologies Corp (SPCX) through several ETFs, including ARKK, ARKQ, ARKW and ARKX, for a total of $27,180,671. This move signals continued interest in SpaceX, following the purchase of 44,196 shares a day earlier.  Another notable transaction was the sale of 29,974 shares of Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) through the ARKW fund, worth $4,232,628. This sale continues a pattern of consistent sales of Roku shares in recent days.  In addition, ARK sold 8,010 shares of Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD) through the ARKK and ARKX funds, for a total of $4,134,041. This continued the trend from the previous day, when 8,667 shares were sold.
